sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse_loader: Combinational input loader that sign-extends DATA_W samples to internal/output width and places them into bit-reversed memory order for iterative DIT FFT processing.
sub_modules.fft16_addr_gen: Combinational radix-2 stage address generator that produces butterfly p/q memory addresses and the twiddle-table index from the current stage and butterfly counter.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 using the specified cosine and sine encoding convention.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with Q1.15 rounded twiddle multiplication and no per-stage scaling.
sub_modules.fft16_output_scale: Combinational output formatter that passes FFT results unscaled and applies 1/N arithmetic normalization for IFFT mode.
